allow: PowerShell(npx @tailwindcss/cli -i app/globals.css -o ".\\.tmp-tw-out.css" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20; Write-Output "--- output size ---"; if \(Test-Path ".\\.tmp-tw-out.css"\) { \(Get-Item ".\\.tmp-tw-out.css"\).Length; Remove-Item ".\\.tmp-tw-out.css" -Force })

Bash(ls "C:/Users/Asus/.claude/projects/c--Users-Asus-Desktop-fluentra-build/memory/" 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat "C:/Users/Asus/.claude/projects/c--Users-Asus-Desktop-fluentra-build/memory/MEMORY.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "no memory yet")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== errors in any NEW auth/dashboard/admin file? \(expect none\) ==="; npm run typecheck 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error TS" | Select-String -Pattern "components/auth|app/\\\(auth\\\)|app/auth|app/\\\(dashboard\\\)|app/admin|lib/url|lib/auth|config/site"; Write-Output "=== remaining errors breakdown ==="; npm run typecheck 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error TS" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\\('\)[0] } | Group-Object | Select-Object Count,Name; Write-Output "=== CSS ==="; npx @tailwindcss/cli -i app/globals.css -o ".\\.t.css" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Done|rror"; if \(Test-Path ".\\.t.css"\){Remove-Item ".\\.t.css" -Force})

PowerShell(npx @tailwindcss/cli -i app/globals.css -o ".\\.t.css" 2>&1 | Out-String; if \(Test-Path ".\\.t.css"\) { Write-Output \("CSS OK, bytes: " + \(Get-Item ".\\.t.css"\).Length\); Remove-Item ".\\.t.css" -Force } else { Write-Output "CSS FAILED" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — server is up"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "not up yet" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== total errors ==="; npm run typecheck 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error TS" | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; Write-Output "=== errors in NEW voice files? \(expect none\) ==="; npm run typecheck 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error TS" | Select-String -Pattern "components/voice|hooks/use-|app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/learn|api/voice|config/voices|config/languages|lib/voice|lib/ai/prompts"; Write-Output "=== full breakdown ==="; npm run typecheck 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error TS" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\\('\)[0] } | Group-Object | Select-Object Count,Name)
